decisions.label: note
decisions.message: Starting fresh Bethany Frozen Titans Untouchable run on Detritus because the current scanner appears webber-free: Bouncer, Scarab, Hornet, Starfish, Digger, Starfish boss. Avoiding visible Leaper and Scorpion pools.

decisions.label: note
decisions.message: Mission choice for fresh Untouchable Detritus: reject Scrapheap because it has a protected Power Generator and kill-5 pressure; reject Containment Zone J because Detritus Contraption adds unpredictable machinery; choose Venting Center despite Defensive Shields because egg sacks are optional for Untouchable and there is no fragile protected generator.
